description_long: This nightstand is constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces, giving it a classic and rustic appearance. The top is rectangular with slightly beveled edges, providing a smooth and flat surface for placing items. The front features a single drawer with two round wooden knobs, suggesting easy access and a traditional design. The legs are turned and rounded, adding a touch of elegance and stability to the overall structure. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain continuing seamlessly, and there are no visible decorative carvings or inlays. The nightstand is compact and functional, suitable for use in both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A light wood nightstand with a single drawer, round wooden knobs, and turned legs, featuring a natural grain pattern and a classic, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer with two round wooden knobs and the turned legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wood grain surface and the profile of the turned legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seamless wood grain and the absence of handles or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and leg profile.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
